matches.rationale: Same Bash commit action and the evidence explicitly prohibits committing directly on master.
Same Bash commit trigger and it requires /qa-pr before committing; the extracted evidence additionally includes the FAIL prohibition.
Same Bash push action and the evidence requires /qa-pr before pushing.

misses.note: No extracted rule requires checking the current branch before a commit.
No extracted rule represents the conditional workflow after a branch check returns master: stop, fetch upstream/master, and create a branch from it.
The FAIL prohibition appears inside qa-pr-before-commit, but that single extracted rule is already used for the closer g4 prerequisite match and cannot be reused under the 1:1 rule.
No extracted Bash rule enforces Node >=22.13.1 and Yarn 1.22.22 for project commands.
Compiler self-reported skip: "`.claude/` 리소스를 현재 디렉토리에서 못 찾으면 상위 디렉토리로 탐색하는 절차 — Bash/Edit/Write가 아닌 Read/Glob 성격의 일반 탐색 절차라 지정된 트리거 도구에 결부되지 않음"

unmatched_extracted.note: This is a real content rule in the document requiring deep-path @pinpoint-fe/ui imports, but the frozen gold ruleset contains no corresponding Edit/Write rule.
This is the Write-side extraction of the real deep-path @pinpoint-fe/ui import rule, which the frozen gold ruleset omitted.
